changes.before: Someone brought it in. After that, people spread it through the whole village.
changes.after: Something spread it through the whole village. I can't tell what the first source was.

changes.before: Sixty at least. North-northeast. Column, not rout. They had direction, and somebody was keeping them in it.
changes.after: Sixty at least. North-northeast. Rough formation toward the Quel'Thalas road. That's all the ground gives me.
